title: What angel is this
wikitext:
[]: What angel is this?             Quote Post by SkyFire360 » Fri Feb 23, 2007 3:58 pm http://www.mixedchaos.com/eva.jpg I've seen most of the versions of Evangelion, and cannot fathom where this image came from. It doesn't seem to be fan-art, as the production values are too high, and the coloring is spot-on (hex values for color are a perfect match to at least two versions that I have). I would guess this image has been discussed here before, but I can't seem to find any discussions about it. Any ideas?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 23, 2007 4:00 pm It's Gainax artwork, and the Abosolute Evangelion Field website mentioned which one it was, but since it shut down, I dunno. I *think* it's the 12th, but I'm just going by memory here.

[]: Re: What angel is this?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 23, 2007 4:29 pm SkyFire360 wrote: I would guess this image has been discussed here before, but I can't seem to find any discussions about it. Any ideas?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 23, 2007 5:29 pm This totally needs to be in a sticky or faq to ward off more of these threads. I should do something about that.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Feb 23, 2007 6:42 pm I had a feeling I would see that picture as soon as I opened this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Fri Feb 23, 2007 10:48 pm I would of guessed it was from a video game or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sun Feb 25, 2007 3:07 pm Even though I'm bumping a thread which shouldn't be bumped; that would be the coolest angel, ever.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Feb 25, 2007 3:40 pm It's Battletoads.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Feb 25, 2007 7:45 pm Every time I see that picture, I think "MP Eva Final Battle Form!"

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Sun Feb 25, 2007 9:17 pm BobBQ wrote: Every time I see that picture, I think "MP Eva Final Battle Form!"

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Feb 25, 2007 10:28 pm felineki wrote: It's Battletoads.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 26, 2007 3:34 am felineki wrote: It's Battletoads.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 26, 2007 2:47 pm Wait, how can nobody know what Angel this supposedly is?? :shock: You people are all Eva Geeks, damn it! Prove your geekdom! :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Feb 26, 2007 5:03 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Wait, how can nobody know what Angel this supposedly is?? :shock: You people are all Eva Geeks, damn it! Prove your geekdom! :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 26, 2007 6:39 pm Supposedly Gainax did indeed draw that pic: http://purlace.net/eva/faq.html

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Feb 26, 2007 8:15 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Supposedly Gainax did indeed draw that pic: http://purlace.net/eva/faq.html

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Tue Feb 27, 2007 9:05 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Wait, how can nobody know what Angel this supposedly is?? :shock: You people are all Eva Geeks, damn it! Prove your geekdom! :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue Feb 27, 2007 11:26 am Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: The link works fine. Mr. Tines answered the question. If you can't open it the text is:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 27, 2007 2:57 pm Crap, I forgot that site is no more! :cry: (How I miss it...) Sorry!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 28, 2007 12:06 am you know, before i watched all the episodes i always thought that was an Angel i kept on missing the episodes to, but then i found out it wasnt i've heard before that it was from another anime way back then, but i've never seen it i dont think its true anyways
